notes: Verified via WebSearch 2026-07-11 (Wikipedia, WAFA official Palestinian news agency, Institute for Palestine Studies): established 1974 by the Palestinian National Council (PLO's highest authority); April 17 chosen to commemorate the release of the first Palestinian prisoner, Mahmoud Bakr Hijazi, in the first prisoner exchange.

Deliberately avoided citing current prisoner-count statistics (sources gave a ~9,900 figure as of early April 2025) — both because such numbers go stale quickly and because 2025 falls inside the hasHardcodedYear window; content instead points readers to specialized human-rights sources for up-to-date figures.
Politically sensitive topic — content follows the site's standing Palestine rule: factual, neutral, institution-sourced register (WAFA, Palestinian National Council), no inflammatory language.
Not a paid public holiday — stated directly.
Single-country event (_countryCode: ps), aliasSlugs: [] to avoid base_country_leakage.
